reviews.comment:
Me gusta ir porque los chicos que atienden son muy atentos y cordiales, tienen mucha paciencia, además aprovecho los beneficios que brindan, hoy hay que poder utilizarlos por los costos tan elevados que existen.

(Translated by Google)
I like going because the staff are very attentive and friendly, they have a lot of patience, and I also take advantage of the benefits they offer; these days you have to be able to use them because of the high costs.
